Case Narrative

In brief, for the investigating officer:

  • A total of Rs 2,188,611.35 moved across the accounts in this case, with Rs 1,212,699.85 coming from outside the suspect network.

4 · Findings by Account

TOLLWAYS INFRA PROJECTS PRIVATE LIMITED moderate
acct_002 · Canara Bank · Account Number 120002879229 · Score 378
Rank #1

This account is suspicious due to a large credit transaction of 1000000.00, which was subsequently allocated to 8 debit transactions. The account also exhibits structuring behavior with multiple debit transactions below the individual cutoff. The money flow graph constructed from the transactions reveals a complex network with 102 nodes and 222 directed edges.

  • Money Trail Tracing strong — A credit transaction of 1000000.00 was traced into 8 subsequent debit transactions, with the entire amount allocated and no remaining balance. (+2 more of this type)
  • Structuring Smurfing Detection strong — On 2023-03-28, the account made 5 debit transactions totaling 190054.84, each below the individual cutoff, indicating potential structuring behavior.
  • Failed Reversed Transaction Detection weak — A debit transaction of 37000.0 was followed by a near-equal credit transaction with the same reference number, suggesting a failed reversed transaction. (+1 more of this type)
  • Money Flow Graph Construction structural — A money-flow graph with 102 nodes and 222 directed transaction edges was constructed, revealing a complex network of transactions.
  • Round Value Debit Patterns weak — The account made 6 suspicious round-value debits totaling 1090000.00, with each debit being a multiple of 1000.
Assessment: 3 strong pattern type(s) and 4 distinct pattern(s) — moderate evidence.

Data Security & Method (Appendix)

What stays on this machine

  • All fraud detection, scoring and ranking run on this machine (deterministic code).
  • Raw bank statements and extracted transactions never leave the machine.
  • The money-flow graph, clusters and suspicion scores are computed locally.

What is sent to an external service

  • Only small, redacted text samples are sent to the language model to describe a statement's column layout when local parsing is insufficient.
  • For images / scanned PDFs, the page pixels are sent to a vision model (the one unavoidable case).
  • The language model only rewrites explanations into plain language; it never changes a number, account, or decision.
